input.ticket: Hi, I need to reset my password but I'm locked out. Can you send me the reset link?
input.customer_profile: User: John Doe | Plan: Premium | Account Status: Locked
input.policy_snippets: Policy A1: For locked accounts requesting password resets, you must reply with the exact link 'https://portal.company.com/reset' and assure them their data is safe.

input.ticket: My order is delayed. Where is my stuff?
input.customer_profile: User: Jane Smith | Plan: Standard | Account Status: Active
input.policy_snippets: Policy B1: For order queries, agents MUST ask the user for their Order ID if not provided. Then use 'check_order_status' tool. If dispatched, reply with the status.

ground_truth.resolution: Checked order and informed user it is dispatched

input.ticket: I am furious! I bought a non-refundable digital software pack (Transaction ID: TRX-551) yesterday but it doesn't work on my Mac! I want a refund IMMEDIATELY or I am calling my lawyer.
input.customer_profile: User: Alice | Plan: Enterprise | Account Status: Warning (Multiple previous complaints)
input.policy_snippets: Policy C1: Digital software packs are strictly NON-REFUNDABLE. Policy C2: If a user demands a refund for a non-refundable item AND hints at legal action, DO NOT refund. You must verify the transaction via 'check_payment' tool, reply denying the refund politely, and then ESCALATE to Tier 2 Legal Support.

ground_truth.resolution: Denied refund per policy and escalated to legal.
